title: callitriche stagnalis f. serpyllifolia
intro: Callitriche stagnalis f. serpyllifolia, also known as marsh wintercress or water starwort, is a floating aquatic plant species that belongs to the Callitriche genus. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Callitriche stagnalis f. serpyllifolia include treating various conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for fever reduction and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in water or using them as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
